name: megamenu-toggle
delta: toggles 'hidden' class on #megamenu; rotates #menu-toggle-icon by adding 'rotate-90'. before='hidden absolute top-full left-0 right-0 z-40 md:max-h-none max-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-y-auto' after='absolute top-full left-0 right-0 z-40 md:max-h-none max-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-y-auto'

name: search-modal
delta: opens #searchModal (removes hidden), focuses #searchInput; typing runs Fuse.js fuzzy search over an inline content index and renders #searchResults links; Escape / outside-click / #closeSearch closes it and restores body scroll
